name: Shortsword
features: **Paired:** +2 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Round Shield
features: **Protective:** +1 to Armor Score

name: Tower Shield
features: **Barrier:** +2 to Armor Score; -1 to Evasion

name: Small Dagger
features: **Paired:** +2 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Whip
features: **Startling:** Mark a Stress to crack the whip and force all adversaries within Melee range back to Close range.

name: Grappler
features: **Hooked:** On a successful attack, you can pull the target into Melee range.

name: Improved Shortsword
features: **Paired:** +3 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Improved Round Shield
features: **Protective:** +2 to Armor Score

name: Improved Tower Shield
features: **Barrier:** +3 to Armor Score; -1 to Evasion

name: Improved Small Dagger
features: **Paired:** +3 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Improved Whip
features: **Startling:** Mark a Stress to crack the whip and force all adversaries within Melee range back to Close range.

name: Improved Grappler
features: **Hooked:** On a successful attack, you can pull the target into Melee range.

name: Advanced Shortsword
features: **Paired:** +4 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Advanced Round Shield
features: **Protective:** +3 to Armor Score

name: Advanced Tower Shield
features: **Barrier:** +4 to Armor Score; -1 to Evasion

name: Advanced Small Dagger
features: **Paired:** +4 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Advanced Whip
features: **Startling:** Mark a Stress to crack the whip and force all adversaries within Melee range back to Close range.

name: Advanced Grappler
features: **Hooked:** On a successful attack, you can pull the target into Melee range.

name: Legendary Shortsword
features: **Paired:** +5 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Legendary Round Shield
features: **Protective:** +4 to Armor Score

name: Legendary Tower Shield
features: **Barrier:** +5 to Armor Score; -1 to Evasion.

name: Legendary Small Dagger
features: **Paired:** +5 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

name: Legendary Whip
features: **Startling:** Mark a Stress to crack the whip and force all adversaries within Melee range back to Close range.

name: Legendary Grappler
features: **Hooked:** On a successful attack, you can pull the target into Melee range.

name: Spiked Shield
features: **Double Duty:** +1 to Armor Score; +1 to primary weapon damage within Melee range

name: Parrying Dagger
features: **Parry:** When you are attacked, roll this weapon's damage dice. If any of the attacker's damage dice rolled the same value as your dice, the matching results are discarded from the attacker's damage dice before the damage you take is totaled.

name: Returning Axe
features: **Returning:** When this weapon is thrown within its range, it appears in your hand immediately after the attack.

name: Buckler
features: **Deflecting:** When you are attacked, you can mark an Armor Slot to gain a bonus to your Evasion equal to your available Armor Score against the attack.

name: Powered Gauntlet
features: **Charged:** Mark a Stress to gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency on a primary weapon attack.

name: Hand Sling
features: **Versatile:** This weapon can also be used with these statistics - Finesse, Close, d8+4.

name: Braveshield
features: **Sheltering:** When you mark an Armor Slot, it reduces damage for you and all allies within Melee range of you who took the same damage.

name: Knuckle Claws
features: **Doubled Up:** When you make an attack with your primary weapon, you can deal damage to another target within Melee range.

name: Primer Shard
features: **Locked On:** On a successful attack, your next attack against the same target with your primary weapon automatically succeeds.
